title: struthiola ciliata
intro: Struthiola ciliata, also known as the 'Grassland Struthiola', is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Struthiola ciliata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Struthiola ciliata typically involve the leaves and roots being dried and infused to make teas, decoctions, or tinctures, which are then used to treat various ailments.
